meanings.definition: twist or pull violently or suddenly, especially so as to remove (something) from that to which it is attached or from where it originates
examples: wrench a window off its hinges
wrench oneself free from somebody's grip
a deep sigh was wrenched from his chest

meanings.definition: twist and compress, as if in pain or anguish
twist suddenly so as to sprain
examples: the hikers sprained their ankles when they fell
I turned my ankle and couldn't walk for several days

meanings.definition: causing great physical or mental suffering
